revision.comment: /* Heading text */ not styled that way anymore
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[Google Chrome]], [[Firefox]], [[Internet Explorer]], [[Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[Konqueror]], [[Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|WikiEditor toolbar|border|link=]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bold-b.svg|Bold text|center|link=]] !Bold |'''Bold text''' |'''Bold text''' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon italic-i.svg|Italic text|center|link=]] !Italic |''Italic text'' |''Italic text'' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon signature-ltr.svg|Your signature with timestamp|center|link=]] !Sign talk comments
(with time stamp) |--~~~~ |[[Special:Mypage|Username]] ([[Special:Mytalk|talk]]) {{CURRENTTIME}}, {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} (UTC) |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon link-ltr.svg|Internal link|center|link=]] !Internal link |[[Link title]] |[[Link title]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon image-ltr.svg|Embedded file|center|link=]] ! Insert image |[[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] | [[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon puzzle-ltr.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert template | {{Example}} | {{Example}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon reference.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert [[Help:Footnotes|Reference]] | Insert footnote text here | Insert footnote text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight.svg|center|link=]] ! Activate highlighting in wikitext | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight-progressive.svg|link=]] active |{{Meta|Community Tech/Wikitext editor syntax highlighting|Wikitext editor syntax highlighting}} {{MediaWiki|Extension:CodeMirror}} |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Advanced ! Open advanced menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Special characters ! Open special characters menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Help ! Open help menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Cite ! Open cite toolbar menu | See [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]]. |- |style="white-space: nowrap;"| [[File:OOjs UI icon edit-ltr.svg|link=]] [[File:OOjs UI icon expand.svg|12px|link=]] ! Change "Source editing"
to "Visual editing" | | |} {| class="wikitable" |+ Advanced selections ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-advanced menu-en.png|Advanced toolbar|link=]] |- |[[File:WikiEditor-heading menu-en.png|Enhanced toolbar- Heading toolbar|link=]] | [[Help:Section|Section heading]] |== Heading text == === Heading text === ==== Heading text ==== ===== Heading text ===== |{{fake heading|sub=2|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=3|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=4|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=5|Heading text}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listBullet-ltr.svg|Bulleted list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Bulleted list]] | * Bulleted list item | * Bulleted list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listNumbered-ltr.svg|Numbered list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Numbered list]] | # Numbered list item | # Numbered list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon noWikiText-ltr.svg|Ignore wiki formatting|link=]] | [[Help:Nowiki|Nowiki]]: Ignore wiki formatting | Insert non-formatted text here | Insert non-formatted text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon newline-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Wikipedia:Line-break handling|Line break]] |
| text before
abc |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bigger-ltr.svg|link=]] | Big text | Big text | Big text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon smaller-ltr.svg|link=]] | Small text | Small text | Small text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon superscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Superscript | Superscript text | Superscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon subscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Subscript | Subscript text | Subscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon imageGallery-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Gallery tag|Picture gallery]] | style="text-align: left;" | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon table.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Table|Table]] | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleRedirect-ltr.svg|link=]] | Automatically [[Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]] to another page | #REDIRECT [[Target page name]] | [{{fullurl:Acidic|redirect=no}} Preview a redirect page] |} {|class="wikitable" style="margin-top:0" |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleSearch-ltr.svg]] |Search and Replace | * Search for strings of text and optionally replace them, progressing one at a time or replacing all occurrences at once. * If the ''regular expressions'' check box is selected, then the targeted ''search'' term is interpreted as a symbolic "expression", called a "[[regular expression]]", which will act as a pattern to select targets for ''replacement''. Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[Java (programming language)|Java]], [[JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

abc |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bigger-ltr.svg|link=]] | Big text | Big text | Big text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon smaller-ltr.svg|link=]] | Small text | Small text | Small text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon superscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Superscript | Superscript text | Superscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon subscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Subscript | Subscript text | Subscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon imageGallery-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Gallery tag|Picture gallery]] | style="text-align: left;" | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon table.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Table|Table]] | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleRedirect-ltr.svg|link=]] | Automatically [[Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]] to another page | #REDIRECT [[Target page name]] | [{{fullurl:Acidic|redirect=no}} Preview a redirect page] |} {|class="wikitable" style="margin-top:0" |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleSearch-ltr.svg]] |Search and Replace | * Search for strings of text and optionally replace them, progressing one at a time or replacing all occurrences at once. * If the ''regular expressions'' check box is selected, then the targeted ''search'' term is interpreted as a symbolic "expression", called a "[[regular expression]]", which will act as a pattern to select targets for ''replacement''. Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[Java (programming language)|Java]], [[JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[Google Chrome]], [[Firefox]], [[Internet Explorer]], [[Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[Konqueror]], [[Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|WikiEditor toolbar|border|link=]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bold-b.svg|Bold text|center|link=]] !Bold |'''Bold text''' |'''Bold text''' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon italic-i.svg|Italic text|center|link=]] !Italic |''Italic text'' |''Italic text'' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon signature-ltr.svg|Your signature with timestamp|center|link=]] !Sign talk comments
(with time stamp) |--~~~~ |[[Special:Mypage|Username]] ([[Special:Mytalk|talk]]) {{CURRENTTIME}}, {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} (UTC) |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon link-ltr.svg|Internal link|center|link=]] !Internal link |[[Link title]] |[[Link title]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon image-ltr.svg|Embedded file|center|link=]] ! Insert image |[[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] | [[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon puzzle-ltr.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert template | {{Example}} | {{Example}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon reference.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert [[Help:Footnotes|Reference]] | Insert footnote text here | Insert footnote text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight.svg|center|link=]] ! Activate highlighting in wikitext | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight-progressive.svg|link=]] active |{{Meta|Community Tech/Wikitext editor syntax highlighting|Wikitext editor syntax highlighting}} {{MediaWiki|Extension:CodeMirror}} |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Advanced ! Open advanced menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Special characters ! Open special characters menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Help ! Open help menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Cite ! Open cite toolbar menu | See [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]]. |- |style="white-space: nowrap;"| [[File:OOjs UI icon edit-ltr.svg|link=]] [[File:OOjs UI icon expand.svg|12px|link=]] ! Change "Source editing"
to "Visual editing" | | |} {| class="wikitable" |+ Advanced selections ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-advanced menu-en.png|Advanced toolbar|link=]] |- |[[File:WikiEditor-heading menu-en.png|Enhanced toolbar- Heading toolbar|link=]] | [[Help:Section|Section heading]] |== Heading text == === Heading text === ==== Heading text ==== ===== Heading text ===== |{{fake heading|sub=2|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=3|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=4|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=5|Heading text}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listBullet-ltr.svg|Bulleted list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Bulleted list]] | * Bulleted list item | * Bulleted list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listNumbered-ltr.svg|Numbered list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Numbered list]] | # Numbered list item | # Numbered list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon noWikiText-ltr.svg|Ignore wiki formatting|link=]] | [[Help:Nowiki|Nowiki]]: Ignore wiki formatting | Insert non-formatted text here | Insert non-formatted text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon newline-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Wikipedia:Line-break handling|Line break]] |

Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[Java (programming language)|Java]], [[JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[Java (programming language)|Java]], [[JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[:en:Google Chrome|Google Chrome]], [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Internet Explorer|Internet Explorer]], [[Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[Konqueror]], [[Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|WikiEditor toolbar|border|link=]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bold-b.svg|Bold text|center|link=]] !Bold |'''Bold text''' |'''Bold text''' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon italic-i.svg|Italic text|center|link=]] !Italic |''Italic text'' |''Italic text'' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon signature-ltr.svg|Your signature with timestamp|center|link=]] !Sign talk comments

Open advanced menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Special characters ! Change "Source editing"
to "Visual editing" | | |} {| class="wikitable" |+ Advanced selections ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-advanced menu-en.png|Advanced toolbar|link=]] |- |[[File:WikiEditor-heading menu-en.png|Enhanced toolbar- Heading toolbar|link=]] | [[Help:Section|Section heading]] |== Heading text == === Heading text === ==== Heading text ==== ===== Heading text ===== |{{fake heading|sub=2|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=3|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=4|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=5|Heading text}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listBullet-ltr.svg|Bulleted list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Bulleted list]] | * Bulleted list item | * Bulleted list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listNumbered-ltr.svg|Numbered list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Numbered list]] | # Numbered list item | # Numbered list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon noWikiText-ltr.svg|Ignore wiki formatting|link=]] | [[Help:Nowiki|Nowiki]]: Ignore wiki formatting | Insert non-formatted text here | Insert non-formatted text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon newline-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Wikipedia:Line-break handling|Line break]] |

You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[:en:Java (programming language)|Java]], [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[:en:Google Chrome|Google Chrome]], [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Internet Explorer|Internet Explorer]], [[Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[:en:Konqueror|Konqueror]], [[Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! abc |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bigger-ltr.svg|link=]] | Big text | Big text | Big text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon smaller-ltr.svg|link=]] | Small text | Small text | Small text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon superscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Superscript | Superscript text | Superscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon subscript-ltr.svg|link=]] | Subscript | Subscript text | Subscript text |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon imageGallery-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Gallery tag|Picture gallery]] | style="text-align: left;" | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 | Example.jpg|Caption1 Example.jpg|Caption2 |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon table.svg|link=]] | [[Help:Table|Table]] | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} | {| class="wikitable" border="1" |- ! header 1 ! header 2 ! header 3 |- | row 1, cell 1 | row 1, cell 2 | row 1, cell 3 |- | row 2, cell 1 | row 2, cell 2 | row 2, cell 3 |} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleRedirect-ltr.svg|link=]] | Automatically [[Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]] to another page | #REDIRECT [[Target page name]] | [{{fullurl:Acidic|redirect=no}} Preview a redirect page] |} {|class="wikitable" style="margin-top:0" |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon articleSearch-ltr.svg]] |Search and Replace | * Search for strings of text and optionally replace them, progressing one at a time or replacing all occurrences at once. * If the ''regular expressions'' check box is selected, then the targeted ''search'' term is interpreted as a symbolic "expression", called a "[[regular expression]]", which will act as a pattern to select targets for ''replacement''. Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[:en:Java (programming language)|Java]], [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[:en:Google Chrome|Google Chrome]], [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Internet Explorer|Internet Explorer]], [[:en:Microsoft Edge|Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[:en:Konqueror|Konqueror]], [[Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[:en:Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|WikiEditor toolbar|border|link=]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bold-b.svg|Bold text|center|link=]] !Bold |'''Bold text''' |'''Bold text''' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon italic-i.svg|Italic text|center|link=]] !Italic |''Italic text'' |''Italic text'' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon signature-ltr.svg|Your signature with timestamp|center|link=]] !Sign talk comments
(with time stamp) |--~~~~ |[[Special:Mypage|Username]] ([[Special:Mytalk|talk]]) {{CURRENTTIME}}, {{CURRENTDAY}} {{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}} (UTC) |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon link-ltr.svg|Internal link|center|link=]] !Internal link |[[:en:Link title|Link title]] |[[:en:Link title|Link title]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon image-ltr.svg|Embedded file|center|link=]] ! Insert image |[[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] | [[File:Example.jpg|thumbnail]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon puzzle-ltr.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert template | {{Example}} | {{Example}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon reference.svg|center|link=]] ! Insert [[Help:Footnotes|Reference]] | Insert footnote text here | Insert footnote text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight.svg|center|link=]] ! Activate highlighting in wikitext | [[File:OOjs UI icon highlight-progressive.svg|link=]] active |{{Meta|Community Tech/Wikitext editor syntax highlighting|Wikitext editor syntax highlighting}} {{MediaWiki|Extension:CodeMirror}} |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Advanced ! Open advanced menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Special characters ! Open special characters menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Help ! Open help menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Cite ! Open cite toolbar menu | See [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]]. |- |style="white-space: nowrap;"| [[File:OOjs UI icon edit-ltr.svg|link=]] [[File:OOjs UI icon expand.svg|12px|link=]] ! Change "Source editing"
to "Visual editing" | | |} {| class="wikitable" |+ Advanced selections ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-advanced menu-en.png|Advanced toolbar|link=]] |- |[[File:WikiEditor-heading menu-en.png|Enhanced toolbar- Heading toolbar|link=]] | [[Help:Section|Section heading]] |== Heading text == === Heading text === ==== Heading text ==== ===== Heading text ===== |{{fake heading|sub=2|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=3|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=4|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=5|Heading text}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listBullet-ltr.svg|Bulleted list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Bulleted list]] | * Bulleted list item | * Bulleted list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listNumbered-ltr.svg|Numbered list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Numbered list]] | # Numbered list item | # Numbered list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon noWikiText-ltr.svg|Ignore wiki formatting|link=]] | [[Help:Nowiki|Nowiki]]: Ignore wiki formatting | Insert non-formatted text here | Insert non-formatted text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon newline-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Wikipedia:Line-break handling|Line break]] |

Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[:en:Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[:en:Java (programming language)|Java]], [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]], [[Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[:en:Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[:en:Java (programming language)|Java]], [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]], [[:en:Python (programming language)|Python]], [[Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef}}{{pp-move-indef}} {{for|the toolbar that shows under the edit window and allows the insertion of various characters and symbols|Help:CharInsert}} {{Wikipedia how-to|H:ETOOL}} In compatible browsers, an '''edit toolbar''' can be automatically displayed with the edit box, provided that this has been set in the [[Help:Preferences|preferences]]. It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[:en:Google Chrome|Google Chrome]], [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Internet Explorer|Internet Explorer]], [[:en:Microsoft Edge|Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[:en:Konqueror|Konqueror]], [[:en:Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[:en:Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|WikiEditor toolbar|border|link=]] |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon bold-b.svg|Bold text|center|link=]] !Bold |'''Bold text''' |'''Bold text''' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon italic-i.svg|Italic text|center|link=]] !Italic |''Italic text'' |''Italic text'' |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon signature-ltr.svg|Your signature with timestamp|center|link=]] !Sign talk comments

Open advanced menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Special characters ! Open special characters menu | See below. |- | colspan="2" | [[File:OOjs_UI_icon_next-ltr.svg|10px|link=]] Help ! Change "Source editing"
to "Visual editing" | | |} {| class="wikitable" |+ Advanced selections ! Icon !! Function !! What it shows when editing !! What it shows on the page |- | colspan="4" style="text-align: center;" |[[File:WikiEditor-advanced menu-en.png|Advanced toolbar|link=]] |- |[[File:WikiEditor-heading menu-en.png|Enhanced toolbar- Heading toolbar|link=]] | [[Help:Section|Section heading]] |== Heading text == === Heading text === ==== Heading text ==== ===== Heading text ===== |{{fake heading|sub=2|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=3|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=4|Heading text}} {{fake heading|sub=5|Heading text}} |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listBullet-ltr.svg|Bulleted list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Bulleted list]] | * Bulleted list item | * Bulleted list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon listNumbered-ltr.svg|Numbered list|link=]] | [[Help:List|Numbered list]] | # Numbered list item | # Numbered list item |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon noWikiText-ltr.svg|Ignore wiki formatting|link=]] | [[Help:Nowiki|Nowiki]]: Ignore wiki formatting | Insert non-formatted text here | Insert non-formatted text here |- | [[File:OOjs UI icon newline-ltr.svg|link=]] | [[Wikipedia:Line-break handling|Line break]] |

It appears automatically for editors who are not logged in. This functions partly as a typing aid and partly as a reminder of the available functions. All the functions are available simply by typing the code directly into the edit box (such as [[link]]) – this may be easier. The toolbar works with [[:en:Google Chrome|Google Chrome]], [[:en:Firefox|Firefox]], [[:en:Internet Explorer|Internet Explorer]], [[:en:Microsoft Edge|Microsoft Edge]], [[w:Mozilla Application Suite|the Mozilla Suite]]/[[W:SeaMonkey|SeaMonkey]], [[:en:Konqueror|Konqueror]], [[:en:Safari (browser)|Safari]] and [[:en:Opera (browser)|Opera]]. In Mozilla browsers, IE, and Chrome, you can format existing text by highlighting the text you want to format and clicking the relevant button on the toolbar. If you click a button without selecting any text, sample text will be inserted at the cursor's position (like so: '''Bold text'''). In other browsers, clicking on the button presents an explanation for that feature. (Pre-release 9.0 versions of Opera browser also seem to support the advanced functionality.) You can switch off or switch on personal preferences set at {{myprefs|Editing|check={{MediaWiki:Wikieditor-toolbar-preference}}}}. ===Source editor=== If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:WikiEditor-toolbar-en.png|center]] Then you are using the [[Wikipedia:Source editor|source editor]]. === VisualEditor === If your toolbar looks like this: [[File:VisualEditor toolbar-en.png|center|750px]] Then you are using the rich-text [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|visual editor]]. == List of functions == {| class="wikitable" |+ Source editor ! Any amount of text can be matched by a regular expression. Languages that use this type of regular expression include [[:en:Perl (programming language)|Perl]], [[:en:Java (programming language)|Java]], [[:en:JavaScript|JavaScript]], [[:en:Python (programming language)|Python]], [[:en:Ruby (programming language)|Ruby]], [[:en:.NET Framework|.NET]], and [[:en:XML Schema (W3C)|XML]]. * A list of the regular expressions accepted by this search and replace box [https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions?redirectlocale=en-US&redirectslug=Core_JavaScript_1.5_Guide%2FRegular_Expressions has been compiled for reference by the Mozilla Contributors.] |} == See also == {{Commons|MediaWiki edit toolbar}} * [[Wikipedia:RefToolbar/2.0]] {{Help navigation}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help]] {{reflist hide}}
